verification_commands: source scripts/agent-worktree-env.sh && cd ios && xcodebuild test -scheme LaneShadow -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSCardTests -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSPanelTests -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSGlassPanelTests -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSGlassPanelTypeSafetyTests
source scripts/agent-worktree-env.sh && cd ios && xcodebuild -project LaneShadow.xcodeproj -scheme LaneShadow -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' -quiet build

for s in atoms.card.default atoms.card.with-content atoms.panel.default atoms.panel.nested atoms.glasspanel.chrome atoms.glasspanel.callout-signal atoms.glasspanel.callout-warning; do grep -q "$s" ios/LaneShadow/Sandbox/LaneShadowStories.swift || exit 1; done && grep -q 'LSSurfaceStories' ios/LaneShadow/Sandbox/LaneShadowStories.swift
red_phase_commands: source scripts/agent-worktree-env.sh && cd ios && xcodebuild test -scheme LaneShadow -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSCardTests -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSPanelTests -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSGlassPanelTests -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSGlassPanelTypeSafetyTests
notes: RED phase produced expected compile failures because LSCard, LSPanel, LSGlassPanel, and AccentColor did not yet exist.
Focused atom tests passed; one intermediate rerun failed due simulator busy / application preflight checks, and the latest rerun passed again.
swiftformat lint still reports pre-existing unrelated failures in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Molecules/*.
Surface stories live in LaneShadowStories.swift because that file is the currently compiled sandbox aggregator in this target.
surface.glass is not publicly exposed by the current theme API; fallback resolution lives outside the three atom files.
